name: Situational Awareness LP
description: AI/AGI-thesis fund. Concentrated bets on AI compute and infrastructure.

name: Duquesne Family Office LLC
description: Macro/generalist family office. Druckenmiller's vehicle since 2010.

name: Citadel Advisors LLC
description: Multi-strategy investment manager with very broad 13F exposure across equities, ETFs, and options.

name: Millennium Management LLC
description: Large multi-manager platform with diversified 13F exposure across equities, ETFs, and options.

name: Coatue Management LLC
description: Technology-focused investment manager with public equity exposure across software, internet, semiconductors, and growth companies.

name: Appaloosa LP
description: Generalist hedge fund led by David Tepper, with concentrated public equity and ETF positions.

name: Tiger Global Management LLC
description: Growth-oriented investment manager with emphasis on internet, software, consumer technology, and global platform companies.

name: Pershing Square Capital Management, L.P.
description: Concentrated activist investment manager led by Bill Ackman.

name: Third Point LLC
description: Event-driven and activist-oriented investment manager led by Daniel Loeb.

name: Viking Global Investors LP
description: Long/short equity manager with broad but research-intensive public equity exposure.

name: AQR Capital Management LLC
description: Quantitative investment manager with broad factor, equity, ETF, and options exposure in 13F filings.

name: Berkshire Hathaway Inc.
description: Public holding company led by Warren Buffett. The 13F captures Berkshire's marketable U.S. equity portfolio; cash and Treasury bills come from Berkshire company filings.
